title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting, embedding and model management.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that adds Ollama models as LLM and embeddings providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting, model management and RAG using a local Ollama backend.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API with ActiveModel-style interfaces.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI with interactive model picker, chat history and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models onto Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app using Next.js and the ollama-js SDK for private LLM chats.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for fine-tuning, RAG, function-calling and hardware optimizations.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible Ollama binaries and module for NixOS.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers inside CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-github-actions
summary: GitHub Action to install and start Ollama on Ubuntu/macOS runners for CI testing.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Turn-key Retrieval-Augmented-Generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-mistral-finetune
summary: End-to-end repo showing how to fine-tune Mistral 7B, convert to GGUF and load into Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that brings local LLM power to Discord servers via Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for running private LLM summarization and Q&A on your vault using Ollama.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repo tracking community SDKs for Go, Rust, C#, Swift and other languages.
